human_knight.name: 罗兰·晨星
human_knight.portrait: A noble human knight in silver plate armor, short brown hair, determined expression, holding a longsword, DND fantasy art style, character portrait
human_knight.backstory: 曾是王国骑士团的见习骑士，在一次边境冲突中展现了非凡的勇气，从此踏上了冒险之路。

elf_ranger.name: 莉雅·月影
elf_ranger.portrait: An elegant elf ranger with silver hair and pointed ears, green forest cloak, holding an ornate elven bow, mystical forest background, DND fantasy art style, character portrait
elf_ranger.backstory: 来自月光森林的精灵游侠，为了寻找失落的精灵古遗物而离开家园，眼睛能在黑暗中视物。

dwarf_smith.name: 巴林·铁拳
dwarf_smith.portrait: A stout dwarf blacksmith with a magnificent braided red beard, leather apron over chainmail, holding a glowing forge hammer, sparks flying, DND fantasy art style, character portrait
dwarf_smith.backstory: 铁炉堡最年轻的锻造大师，因为打造了一件传说中的装备而被逐出师门——师父说他『还不够格』。

goblin_trickster.name: 吱吱·暗袋
goblin_trickster.portrait: A mischievous goblin rogue with large pointy ears and a toothy grin, wearing a patchwork leather vest, holding a glowing dice, shadowy alley background, DND fantasy art style, character portrait
goblin_trickster.backstory: 没人知道吱吱是从哪来的——包括他自己。他只知道幸运女神跟他开了个玩笑：他的运气好得离谱。

dragonborn_paladin.name: 萨洛斯·龙焰
dragonborn_paladin.portrait: A majestic dragonborn paladin with golden scales and draconic features, wearing ornate golden plate armor with a celestial glow, holding a massive two-handed sword, temple background, DND fantasy art style, character portrait
dragonborn_paladin.backstory: 龙神神殿的守护者，身上的金色鳞片是祖先与天界龙族盟约的证明。她的龙息是治愈而非毁灭。
